creator: dzs-ports@dzs.fx.org
text:
port converters/p5-JSON-XS 2.25 requires perl module devel/p5-common-sense

Fix: 

cd /usr/ports/devel/p5-common-sense
make install clean


(Obviously, the port Makefile for p5-JSON-XS should be updated to list this as a dependency.)
How-To-Repeat: $ perl -MJSON::XS -e 1

Can't locate common/sense.pm in @INC (@INC contains: /home/dzs/cpan/lib/perl5/5.8.9 /home/dzs/cpan/lib/perl5 /home/dzs/cpan/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9 /home/dzs/cpan/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.9/BSDPAN /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9 /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.9/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.9 .) at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/JSON/XS.pm line 104.
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/JSON/XS.pm line 104.
Compilation failed in require.
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted.
